payload.label: dresser
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown wooden dresser showing the front drawer stack and the right-side edge; multiple horizontal drawer fronts with visible drawer pulls, a worn/scuffed finish, and the piece is cropped at the right edge (partial). Estimated distance ~0.8 meters from the camera.
